WITH bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.bowler AS player_id,
        COUNT(CASE WHEN wt.player_out IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS total_wickets,
        SUM(COALESCE(bs.runs_scored, 0)) AS total_runs_conceded_off_bat,
        COUNT(bb.ball_id) AS total_balls_bowled
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken wt ON bb.match_id = wt.match_id 
        AND bb.over_id = wt.over_id 
        AND bb.ball_id = wt.ball_id 
        AND bb.innings_no = wt.innings_no
    LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs...

WITH bowler_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        b.bowler,
        COUNT(w.player_out) AS wickets,
        SUM(bs.runs_scored) AS runs_conceded,
        COUNT(b.ball_id) AS balls_bowled
    FROM ball_by_ball b
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken w 
        ON b.match_id = w.match_id 
        AND b.over_id = w.over_id 
        AND b.ball_id = w.ball_id 
        AND b.innings_no = w.innings_no
        AND b.striker = w.player_out
    LEFT JOIN batsman_scored bs 
        ON b.match_id = bs.match_id 
        AND b...

WITH bowler_wickets AS (
    SELECT 
        bb.bowler AS player_id,
        COUNT(wt.player_out) AS total_wickets,
        SUM(COALESCE(bs.runs_scored, 0)) AS total_runs_conceded_off_bat,
        COUNT(*) AS total_balls_bowled
    FROM ball_by_ball bb
    LEFT JOIN wicket_taken wt 
        ON bb.match_id = wt.match_id

        AND bb.ball_id = wt.ball_id

        AND wt.kind_out != 'run out'
